title: Inspect Each Hospital Station During Daily Preventive Maintenance
summary: Perform the documented daily preventive maintenance inspection for each hospital station by checking barcode scanner operation, confirming stacklight operation, verifying the tabletop is free of debris, and recording whether each inspection point meets the source criteria.
when_to_use: Use during daily preventive maintenance when inspecting each hospital station for the documented inspection points: barcode scanner operation, stacklight operation, and tabletop cleanliness.
not_for: Do not use this runbook as a repair procedure for a non-operational barcode scanner.
Do not use this runbook as a repair procedure for a non-operational stacklight.
Do not use this runbook as a cleaning procedure beyond verifying that the tabletop is free of debris, because no cleaning method is provided in this source section.
Do not use this runbook to define detailed test methods for scanner or stacklight operation, because this source section lists inspection points only.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform the daily preventive maintenance inspection at each hospital station and record whether each documented inspection point meets the source criteria.

safety_notes: This source section is an inspection-only maintenance reference and does not provide repair, cleaning, lockout/tagout, or production-stop instructions.
Escalate if a documented inspection point does not meet the source criteria and no source-backed corrective action is provided in this section.
access_or_tools_needed: Physical access to each hospital station
Visual access to the barcode scanner, stacklight, and tabletop
Daily preventive maintenance checklist or record

access_required: Physical access to each hospital station
system_preconditions: Hospital stations are available to be visually inspected during daily preventive maintenance.

visual_references.description: Reference photo of the hospital station to help identify the station during inspection.
Reference photo of the hospital station stacklight for stacklight identification during inspection.
Hospital station operation image showing the hospital station area and scanner context.
Hospital HMI screen artifact that provides hospital station barcode-related context.
Hospital HMI screen artifact that provides hospital station barcode-related context.
Operator station HMI artifact included in the candidate packet; not required for this inspection.
Operator station reference image included in the candidate packet; not required for this hospital station inspection.
Scanner-related artifact included in the candidate packet for general scanner context.

steps.title: Inspect barcode scanner operation at the hospital station
steps.purpose: Verify that the hospital station barcode scanner meets the documented daily preventive maintenance inspection point.
steps.instruction: Go to the hospital station and inspect whether the barcode scanner is operational.
steps.healthy_condition: The barcode scanner is operational for the hospital station.
steps.failure_condition: The barcode scanner is not operational or its operational state cannot be confirmed from the inspection.

actions.label: Inspect barcode scanner
actions.exact_action: Go to each hospital station and check whether the barcode scanner is operational.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Hospital station area and green scanner context associated with hospital station operation.
Hospital station barcode-related HMI context to identify barcode handling at the hospital station.
Hospital station barcode-related HMI context associated with barcode verification and mismatch handling.
Scanner-related visual context included in the packet for scanner identification support.

stop_or_escalate_if: Barcode scanner operational state cannot be confirmed using the source-backed inspection point alone.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Inspect each hospital station for the following: The barcode scanner is operational.
Artifact appears on page 92 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_5_9_hospital_station_operation.

steps.title: Inspect stacklight operation at the hospital station
steps.purpose: Verify that the hospital station stacklight meets the documented daily preventive maintenance inspection point.
steps.instruction: Check whether the hospital station stacklight is operational.
steps.healthy_condition: The hospital station stacklight is present and operational.
steps.failure_condition: The stacklight is not operational or its operational state cannot be confirmed from the inspection.

actions.label: Inspect stacklight
actions.exact_action: Check whether the hospital station stacklight is operational.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall hospital station view to identify the station and stacklight location.
Hospital station stacklight photo for stacklight identification and visual reference.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stacklight operational state cannot be confirmed using the source-backed inspection point alone.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Inspect each hospital station for the following: The stacklight is operational.
Figure 3-5 appears on page 29 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_3_3_1_hospital_station_stacklight.
Figure 3-6 appears on page 29 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_3_3_1_hospital_station_stacklight.

steps.title: Inspect tabletop cleanliness
steps.purpose: Verify that the hospital station tabletop meets the documented daily preventive maintenance inspection point for cleanliness.
steps.instruction: Inspect the hospital station tabletop and verify it is free of debris.
steps.expected_result: The tabletop is free of debris.
steps.healthy_condition: The tabletop is free of debris.
steps.failure_condition: Debris is present on the tabletop or tabletop condition does not meet the documented inspection criterion.

actions.label: Inspect tabletop
actions.exact_action: Inspect the hospital station tabletop and verify it is free of debris.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Hospital station physical layout for tabletop area identification.
Hospital station area for general tabletop and work-surface context.

stop_or_escalate_if: Tabletop is not free of debris and no source-backed cleaning method is provided in this section.
Tabletop condition cannot be restored using source-backed actions from this section.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Inspect each hospital station for the following: The tabletop is free of debris.

steps.title: Record inspection results for each hospital station
steps.purpose: Document whether each hospital station meets the source-defined daily preventive maintenance inspection criteria.
steps.instruction: Record whether each documented inspection point meets the source criteria for each hospital station.
steps.expected_result: Inspection results are recorded for barcode scanner operation, stacklight operation, and tabletop cleanliness for each hospital station.
steps.healthy_condition: Each inspection point is documented as meeting the source criteria for the station inspected.
steps.failure_condition: One or more inspection points are not recorded, or recorded results show that source criteria were not met.

actions.label: Record inspection status
actions.exact_action: Record whether each documented inspection point meets the source criteria for each hospital station.

stop_or_escalate_if: Any inspection point does not meet the source criteria.
Required inspection results cannot be recorded on the daily preventive maintenance checklist or record.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Inspect each hospital station for the following: The barcode scanner is operational. The stacklight is operational. The tabletop is free of debris.

success_criteria: Each hospital station has been inspected for the three documented daily preventive maintenance points.
Each hospital station barcode scanner is confirmed operational.
Each hospital station stacklight is confirmed operational.
Each hospital station tabletop is verified to be free of debris.
Inspection results are recorded for each hospital station.
healthy_conditions: Barcode scanner is operational at each hospital station.
Stacklight is operational at each hospital station.
Tabletop is free of debris at each hospital station.
Inspection status is recorded for each documented inspection point.
failure_conditions: A hospital station barcode scanner is not operational.
A hospital station stacklight is not operational.
A hospital station tabletop is not free of debris.
An inspection point cannot be confirmed using the source-backed inspection information.
Inspection results are not recorded for one or more hospital stations.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if a barcode scanner is not operational.
Escalate if a stacklight is not operational.
Escalate if tabletop debris cannot be addressed through source-backed actions; no cleaning method is provided in this section.
Escalate if the source does not provide enough detail to confirm operational status for a documented inspection point.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Hospital station scanner and work-area context.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Inspect each hospital station for the following: The barcode scanner is operational. The stacklight is operational. The tabletop is free of debris.

missing_details: The source section provides inspection points only and does not define a detailed test method for confirming barcode scanner operation.
The source section provides inspection points only and does not define a detailed test method for confirming stacklight operation.
The source section does not provide a cleaning method for removing tabletop debris.
The source section does not provide repair or corrective action steps for failed inspection points.
The source section does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source section does not specify whether production stop or lockout/tagout is required.
